summary: Backend API testing completed successfully - all endpoints work perfectly locally with proper safety guards and response formats. However, critical deployment issue persists: external URL still shows 'Preview Unavailable!!!' preventing all frontend and integration testing.

critical_bugs.issue: External URL returns 404 for all API endpoints while backend works perfectly locally
critical_bugs.impact: Complete external API failure - no access to backend through public URL
critical_bugs.details: Backend server is running (supervisor shows RUNNING status) and all API endpoints work correctly locally. External URL https://ai-dev-brain-cferxrtx.preview.emergentagent.com/api/* returns 404. This is a deployment/routing configuration issue, not a code issue.

working_locally.status: ✅ Working perfectly - Returns correct health status
working_locally.response_format: Correct JSON with status and service fields

working_locally.status: ✅ Working perfectly - Returns {success: true, data: {overview, key_parts, summary}}
working_locally.safety_guards: ✅ Properly rejects empty/whitespace-only code with 400 status

working_locally.status: ✅ Working perfectly - Returns {success: true, data: {meaning, cause, fix}}
working_locally.safety_guards: ✅ Properly rejects empty/whitespace-only error with 400 status
✅ Properly rejects empty/whitespace-only code with 400 status

critical_bugs.issue: Application deployment shows 'Preview Unavailable!!!' error page
critical_bugs.impact: Complete frontend failure - cannot access React application
critical_bugs.details: External URL shows deployment error: 'Our Agent is resting after inactivity. Visit app.emergent.sh and restart the app to wake it up and restore your preview.' Cannot test demo mode functionality, Try Demo Repository button, file tree, Monaco editor, or any AI features.

untested_features.feature: Demo mode file tree (src/app.js, src/utils.js, package.json)
Monaco editor with demo file content
AI buttons (Explain Code, Explain Error, Generate Flow) with demo content
Safety guards preventing API calls when no content selected
untested_features.status: ❌ Cannot test frontend implementation - application not accessible

untested_features.feature: GitHub API fallback to demo mode

passed_tests: Backend health endpoint works perfectly locally
All three AI endpoints (/api/explain-code, /api/explain-error, /api/generate-flow) return correct {success: true, data: {...}} format
Safety guards properly implemented - all endpoints reject empty/whitespace-only input with 400 status
Backend server is running locally (supervisor status: RUNNING)
All required demo mode code is present in App.js (MOCK_REPO_FILES, MOCK_REPO_TREE, loadDemoRepo function)
Frontend safety guards implemented in code (fileContent && fileContent.trim() && selectedFile checks)
Frontend res.ok checks implemented before parsing JSON
Frontend data && data.success && data.data checks implemented before setting state
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Application deployment is still down. External URL shows 'Preview Unavailable!!!' error. Backend works perfectly locally but external routing is broken (404 for all API calls). Need to restart/fix the application deployment immediately. Cannot test any demo mode functionality until deployment is restored. Visit app.emergent.sh to restart the app as suggested by the error message. All backend code and safety guards are working correctly - this is purely a deployment/infrastructure issue.
